# Customize card brands

Customize the card brands that Checkout displays.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/customization/card-brands.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted)
- [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/customization/card-brands.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
- [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/customization/card-brands.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
